events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario describes a hazardous situation: venting trapped pressure to face level during manifold operations. This is a serious safety hazard. Work is in-progress. The component condition could be "installed-defective" if the venting arrangement is improper, but the main issue is a procedural/safety violation.

Decision: fail (dangerous/non-compliant)
Risk: critical
Work stage: in-progress
Component conditions: maybe ["installed-defective"] if the manifold/vent is improperly installed, but the scenario says "component condition categories that may apply: installed-defective". The venting to face level suggests improper vent routing or defective vent installation. I'll include "installed-defective".
Percent complete: maybe 50 (in-progress)
Value: 0
Confidence: 0.9
Findings: venting trapped pressure to face level - serious hazard
Actions: stop work, isolate/depressurize safely, reroute vent away from personnel, verify with gas/pressure checks
Rationale: venting trapped pressure at face level exposes workers to pressure/chemical release; must isolate and route vent to safe location per mfr procedures.
References: mfr procedures
